title: Meridian Launches Global Certification in Applied AI Safety
summary: The new credential fills a gap identified by 2,000+ member survey respondents: a rigorous, vendor-neutral standard for AI safety practice.

title: Membership Surpasses 480,000 Professionals Across 148 Countries
summary: A decade of chapter growth in the Global South accounts for most of the past two years' net new membership.

title: Meridian Press Publishes Open-Access Archive of 40 Years of Proceedings
summary: Over 210,000 papers are now freely accessible, digitized and OCR-corrected in partnership with three national libraries.

title: New Student Chapter Grant Program Opens Applications
summary: Up to $15,000 in seed funding is available for new university chapters in underrepresented regions.

title: Meridian Statement on Responsible Disclosure Norms for Foundation Models
summary: A working group of 30 member-researchers publishes shared norms for reporting emergent capabilities and safety-relevant findings.

title: GreenCompute Track Added to 2027 Flagship Symposium
summary: Sustainable systems research gets a dedicated track after three years as the fastest-growing workshop submission category.
